item.title: Ferske spor: June 2025
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Link to Deichman music blog in Norwegian 🇳🇴 here . Kiasmos - Sisteron (Sisteron, 2025) Minimal, atmospheric electronica. Has an ethereal and contemplative soundscape that helps make this song both intimate and grand. Here, Kiasmos manages to deliver a song that is slightly hypnotic, with enough organic warmth. Cercle · Kiasmos - Sisteron Nym - Ten thousand smokes (False noon, 2023) A journey through a kaleidoscope of sound. Spacious and dreamlike song from Nym, which delivers a pure and sensual experience.

item.title: Ferske spor: January 2025
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Link to Deichman music blog in Norwegian 🇳🇴 here . SpellSpellSpell – «I wanna» Not the easiest song to find online, but if you’ve missed hearing from the Spice Girls then you can spin this remix for a lo-fi version with more chill than 90s pop bangers. Bearcubs – «Yeah (Never know)» Hands down for this song that I’ve played the most since the winter solstice. Exploratory atmospheric with a hint of uncertainty?

item.title: Deichman: Album of the year 2024
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Link to Deichmans music blog (in Norwegian 🇳🇴) is available here . Where do you want to go today? Maybe your brain needs a transcendental head massage, or are you in the nostalgic corner? Do you dare to listen to an album that compulsively and somatically moves you? If that doesn’t suit your taste, you can always give your soul a funky spa gift card? All this and your annual dose of micronutrients are here!
